# BaseLib bundled fallback

These files are copied only when the mod manager cannot download BaseLib from
the official latest GitHub release.

Source:
https://github.com/Alchyr/BaseLib-StS2/releases/tag/v0.2.8

Downloaded files:

- BaseLib.dll
- BaseLib.pck
- BaseLib.json

SHA256:

- BaseLib.dll: 8C9E8980DC388F8AB4178708635CF91C2E246D45105946DC161E7092E8DACD27
- BaseLib.pck: 96FC0BE35CF587F954B1C49338EA49E010CEE9B9446C48134F6AA5CFD73A44FD
- BaseLib.json: 47CF736A1CF2622B06463019E9D3E951146A508D89C601660B58A93074AE0804
